description.value: Price 12,250 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate divination DESCRIPTION A greater assassin’s sight is similar to the standard assassin’s sight, but it has a noticeably sleeker design and provides its wielder greater range. It has three settings: 0â30 feet, 30â60 feet, and 60â90 feet. In addition, setting the range on a greater assassin’s sight is a standard action (though it still provokes attacks of opportunity ). Finally, a greater assassin’s sight grants a +4 competence bonus on attack rolls to confirm critical hits within the set range. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,125 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells locate weakness, true strike
